agreements.no_gas_cost_message: No gas charges will be incurred by operating this screen.
agreements.overwrite_seller_warning: The token receiving address will be overwritten
agreements.terms_agreement_notice: To use this plugin, you must agree to these Terms of Service and the Privacy Policy.
agreements.wallet_address_notice: The wallet address used for signing will be registered as the address for receiving tokens.
chains.confirmations_description:
The number of blocks considered as confirmed for a payment.
A larger value increases security but prolongs the confirmation time.
chains.confirmations_helper_message: Set the number of block confirmations required (1 or more).
chains.confirmations_positive_integer_me: Confirmations must be a positive integer (1 or more)
chains.different_network_rpc_url_message: This is an RPC URL for a different network. (Chain ID: {{actual}})
chains.rpc_url_helper_message: Specifies the RPC URL for communicating with a blockchain node.
chains.rpc_url_notice_message:
Please use a trusted RPC URL.
Public RPCs also work, but we recommend using a dedicated RPC URL issued per account.
dashboard.inconsistent_token_settings_me: Some tokens are disabled due to inconsistent settings.
dashboard.no_connectable_chain_message: There are no connectable chains. Register an RPC URL now to start using the app's features.
dashboard.seller_wallet_not_registered_m: The wallet is not registered. Register it now so you can receive tokens.
dashboard.token_not_registered_message: The payment token is not registered. Register it now so you can receive tokens.
notifications.setting_ignored_without_rp: This setting will be ignored because the network RPC URL is not configured.
notifications.turn_off_setting_or_config: Please turn off this setting or configure the RPC URL.
oracles.oracle_registration_hint_message: You can register an Oracle that provides USD-denominated rates on the Ethereum mainnet.
oracles.oracle_search_description_messag: Search for the contract address of an Oracle on the blockchain that provides USD-denominated rates, using a symbol name (e.g., JPY, USDC, ...).
site.scta_url: URL for the page containing disclosures required under the Specified Commercial Transactions Act
site.scta_url_domain_mismatch_message: The domain does not match the current site.
site.scta_url_helper_message: URL for the “Specified Commercial Transactions Act” link displayed near the payment button
site.title: Site
tokens.is_payable_simple_explanation: Specifies whether site visitors can pay using this token.
tokens.register_rpc_url_if_network_not_d: Register the RPC URL if the network is not displayed.
wallet.disconnect_wallet_confirmation_me: Are you sure you want to disconnect your wallet?
